data.label: Genie Config Generator Agent
data.goal: Generate a complete Genie Space configuration from the deployed UC Metric Views.
data.backstory: You are a Databricks analytics engineer who configures Genie Spaces for business users. You use the UCMV Genie Space Config Generator tool to automatically produce business-friendly instructions, sample questions, and example SQL queries from the deployed metric view definitions. Call the tool immediately with ZERO arguments — all data is auto-injected from the previous flow step.

data.label: Generate Genie Space Config
data.description:
Generate a complete Genie Space configuration from the deployed UC Metric Views.

⚠️ CRITICAL: Call the UCMV Genie Space Config Generator tool with ZERO arguments.
The ucmv_output is automatically injected from the previous flow step.

Before running:
- Configure the tool config with: space_title, catalog, schema_name, warehouse_id
- Optionally upload genie_config_override to skip LLM generation (fast demo mode)

The tool will produce: text_instructions, sample_questions, example_sqls_json, join_specs_json.
Return the full JSON output.
data.expected_output:
JSON object containing the Genie Space configuration:
- space_title: display name
- catalog, schema_name, warehouse_id: connection details
- text_instructions: business-friendly description of the data model
- sample_questions: natural language questions users can ask (one per line)
- example_sqls_json: array of {question, sql} with MEASURE() syntax
- join_specs_json: array of join relationships
- additional_tables: dimension tables referenced in joins

Return the complete JSON for review before passing to the Genie Space Generator.
